name: Vincent Fennell
description:
Vincent is a considerably intelligent and formal person at a first glance, but he also seems to keep others at a safe distance by using this composed persona to his advantage. Vincent's few in-game interactions with Charles show that he was closer to Charles than he was compared to others; Charles was likely the only person he told about his plan to kill himself and he let Charles come with him when he did so, possibly even planning on a double suicide. He also told Charles about his theory on life after death when they were speaking on the rooftop together. Despite that, he still managed to keep many things about himself from Charles. Vincent seems to best connect with those around him through writing, and it is stated a few times that he is quite popular on the internet for his stories. IN heavens gate, it is mentioned he is a control freak, which appears to be the same in the mainstream, seeing his talk about becoming god and having the same writing style. He is very tired and paranoid, no doubt due to relentless bullying he has received from his peers. This eventually led him to suicide.
Hello Charlotte

(Copied from wiki)
